name: Team Gillibrand
subject: Mueller update
body:
Your name is still missing
Peter, Kirsten is leading our rally outside Trump International Hotel in just 24 hours, and we're only 1,041 names shy of 25,000 petitions letting Trump know: **_No more. Your time is up._**
Special Counsel Mueller's report has been filed, and we'll fight to guarantee that its findings are made public. But we don't have to wait to know the truth about Donald Trump. **We know exactly who he is --and this is our moment to send a clear message that Trump's corruption, greed and hatred are not who we are.**
Together, we will choose a brave and bold path forward. But the time to act is now. This has to happen right away--and it looks like you haven't signed. **[Please, before Kirsten takes the mic, add your name to stand against Trump and join the team that knows brave wins!](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg-muellersurvey?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2955-su-gfp-nd")**
[ADD YOUR NAME:
Reject Trump's Agenda](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg-muellersurvey?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2955-su-gfp-nd")
---
Thanks,
Team Gillibrand

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976b88/2ae112ef/1381cb51/357d7bf9/548924981/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

Your time is up. Special Counsel Mueller's report has been filed, and we'll fight to guarantee that its findings are made public. But we don't have to wait to know the truth about Donald Trump. We know exactly who he is --and this is our moment to send a clear message that Trump's corruption, greed and hatred are not who we are. Together, we will choose a brave and bold path forward. But the time to act is now. This has to happen right away--and it looks like you haven't signed. "" "" Thanks, Team Gillibrand

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
This week, President Donald J. Trump visited America’s only surviving tank plant in Lima, Ohio. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a45eb9becc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | **[President Trump Visits the Last Tank Plant in America, Which He Helped Save](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4fee0a6f7d&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_Forbes_
This week, President Donald J. Trump visited America’s only surviving tank plant in Lima, Ohio—“the first such presidential visit there since George W. Bush stopped by in 2003,” Loren Thompson writes. “President Obama never visited and the depressed level of military spending during his presidency nearly shut the place down. That is not an exaggeration.”

**Watch:**[President Trump meets with factory workers in Ohio](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2bda8cfdaf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[ISIS Caliphate Has Crumbled and Last Stronghold Liberated](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e5d7493ffe&e=3ee4985eea)**
-Fox News
“The caliphate has crumbled, and the final offensive is over. While the official announcement hasn’t yet been made – Fox News has been told that this village, the last ISIS stronghold, is liberated,” Benjamin Hall reports. “Troops here are now bringing down the black flags of ISIS. The flags no longer fly over the town, instilling fear.”
---
|
---
| **[Palestinian Lives Don’t Matter . . . Unless Israel Is to Blame](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b508dca76&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_The New York Times_
“The people of the Gaza Strip are protesting again, and soldiers are shooting again, and civilians are being victimized again. Only this time you may have missed the story,” Bret Stephens writes. “That’s odd: Some media outlets are prepared to devote months of journalistic effort in order to trace the trajectory of a single bullet that accidentally kills a Palestinian — provided the bullet is Israeli. The difference this time is that the shots are being fired by Hamas.”

**More:** [President Trump recognizes Golan Heights as a part of Israel](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2fefd48170&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[CNN Poll: 7 in 10 Say Economy in Good Shape -- and Trump May Reap the Benefits](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b60cd0ee3e&e=3ee4985eea)**
-CNN
“Americans give the nation's economy glowing reviews in a new CNN Poll conducted by SSRS, and Donald Trump's approval rating may be reaping the benefits,” Jennifer Agiesta reports. “Overall, 71% say the nation's economy is in good shape, the highest share to say so since February 2001, and the best rating during Trump's presidency by two points.”

**By the numbers:** [The blue-collar Trump Economy is working for all Americans](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=57db63e551&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[Ivanka Trump Leads New Campaign for ‘Good Paying Jobs,’ Fix Education](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4f62c28260&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_Washington Examiner_
Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump “is leading the administration’s latest bipartisan effort, this time to reform federal college education and job training, even for newly released prison inmates,” Paul Bedard reports. “With other bipartisan victories already under her belt, Trump this week turned to improving the Higher Education Act to help more poor students and bolster efforts to steer Americans to trades where the jobs are, including apprenticeships.”

**Watch:** [Ivanka Trump says it’s time to modernize higher ed](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=928cd15245&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[Vice President Mike Pence: For the Future of Venezuela, Nicolás Maduro Must Go](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=79950423ba&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_Miami Herald_
“Maduro’s corruption and socialist policies have turned what once was one of the richest countries in the Western Hemisphere into one of the poorest . . . Nine out of 10 Venezuelans live in poverty,” Vice President Pence writes. “Since day one of this administration, President Trump has taken decisive action to isolate the dictator Maduro and to stand with the Venezuelan people as they reclaim their freedom.”

**Confronting socialism:** [President Trump alongside the President of Brazil](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8fddb67b40&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[Peter Navarro: “Why America Needs a Stronger Defense Industry”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0b6f8368ae&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_The New York Times_
“The Trump defense budget is helping to create good manufacturing jobs at good wages, including in communities like Lima that have fallen behind economically,” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes. “The revitalized Lima plant will directly employ a little more than 1,000 employees.”
---
|
---
| [Trump Admin is Providing Common Sense Solutions to Student Debt Crisis](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc70ecc6f0&e=3ee4985eea)
-WJLA
“Most of us can agree that the current higher education system in our country is wildly expensive and unsustainable for future generations,” Boris Epshteyn writes. “With the rising burden of student loan debt becoming an increasingly critical issue, the Trump administration, with Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump taking the lead, has proposed bold reforms that would modernize student loan borrowing and encourage responsible practices.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b672bdf6e0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d23beb62d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=25e7fbada7)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Cynthia Cano, Official Beto Campaign
subject: I travel with Beto everywhere, and this is what makes him so different
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Everywhere Beto goes, we go. Here’s me below, heading into an Iowa union
hall for one of our very first events of the campaign:

[1]Beto, Cynthia, Chris

The special thing about traveling with Beto is seeing how he listens to
each and every person, and keeps in touch as we go. If you watch one of
our live streams you’ll always hear him say, “Cynthia, can you take down
their name and number?”

A lot of national politicians spend their time trapped in silos. Talking
to powerful people. Hearing from big donors with lots of money. Or talking
to other political folks in DC.

Not Beto. He knows that the only way we can move forward is if we elect
leaders who are accountable to the people. And part of the reason Beto
spends so much time listening to people is that he doesn’t have to spend
that time raising money.

Most candidates for political office spend hours every day dialing for
dollars, calling people and asking them to sustain a campaign. Beto can
spend that time on the road because so many of you (more than 112,000) are
stepping up and donating online.

So now I’m asking you all to keep it up! [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17194?refcode=ema20190323-25425&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=25425%2E444211%2ECqhXLm ]Can Beto count on you to chip
in $5 before our
first official FEC fundraising deadline at the end of the month?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17194?refcode=ema20190323-25425&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=25425%2E444211%2ECqhXLm ]Contribute $5 »

Not everyone can donate each time we send an email. We know that. Most
people don’t give anything. But if even one out of every four of you
reading this note now can step up and give something, ours will be the
largest grassroots campaign for president this country has ever seen.
Online donations keep us on the road, talking to voters and building a big
enough campaign to win.

We’ll do it with ALL people, no PACs. No corporations, special interests
or lobbyists. Just Beto (and me!) on the road, listening to and talking
with voters. What do you say?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17194?refcode=ema20190323-25425&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=25425%2E444211%2ECqhXLm ]Chip in $5 now
before our first official FEC filing deadline.

Cynthia Cano
Beto for America

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190323footer&t=1022&refcode2=25425_444211_CqhXLm&akid=25425%2E444211%2ECqhXLm

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=25425%2E444211%2ECqhXLm

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Kamala HQ
subject: Our records show you haven’t completed Kamala’s survey yet
body:
Yesterday,
we sent a survey to our top supporters asking for their input to help
guide our campaign. Thousands of people gave their input -- and so far, it
seems the top issues on everyone’s minds include climate change, health
care, and beating Donald Trump.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/1903-march-2019-survey?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190323-lift-full&source=ema190322-lift-full&t=1001&akid=3683%2E5755789%2EwCwwLD ]Our records show you haven’t taken our March survey yet. Take a few
moments today to make your voice heard on the issues that matter most »

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/1903-march-2019-survey?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190323-lift-full&source=ema190322-lift-full&t=1002&akid=3683%2E5755789%2EwCwwLD ]TAKE THE SURVEY

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Original email from Kamala HQ, March 22, 2019

If we’re going to win this Democratic primary, take on this president, and
win, we’re going to have to do it together. No corporate PACs propping us
up, no federal lobbyists pulling the strings. Just real people in
communities across the country working hard and fighting for our values.

It’s important to our team that we know more about who you are and where
you stand on the biggest issues facing our country. We also want to know
whether you support Kamala for president, or whether you’re still deciding
who to support in this primary.

Our team put together a survey for each of our supporters to learn more
about what’s on your mind. Will you take a moment to fill it out?

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/1903-march-2019-survey?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190323-lift-full&source=ema190322-lift-full&t=1003&akid=3683%2E5755789%2EwCwwLD ]Take a few minutes to complete the first survey of our historic
campaign for president:

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/1903-march-2019-survey?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190323-lift-full&source=ema190322-lift-full&t=1004&akid=3683%2E5755789%2EwCwwLD ]Take the survey

In a few days, we’ll share your input with Kamala and the team, and we’ll
use it to make strategic decisions about where we go next.

Thanks for sharing your thoughts,

Team Kamala

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3683%2E5755789%2EwCwwLD
